body:
## Summary
- add a changed-file gate before preview build/deploy
- only build previews when site-affecting target paths change
- document the target paths and correct the preview workflow path

## Validation
- ruby YAML parse for `.github/workflows/agent-site-preview.yml`
- prettier check for workflow and README
- verified PR #18 `.skills/paper-to-site/SKILL.md` would return `site_changed=false`

Learn more about [Vercel for GitHub](https://vercel.link/github-learn-more). | Project | Deployment | Actions | Updated (UTC) | | :--- | :----- | :------ | :------ | | [literature-template](https://vercel.com/codiscover-ai/literature-template) | ![Ready](https://vercel.com/static/status/ready.svg) [Ready](https://vercel.com/codiscover-ai/literature-template/9zz7ZdDLi5sGSEp3SKEnyiLYVmtX) | [Preview](https://literature-template-git-agent-preview-targ-b188ca-codiscover-ai.vercel.app), [Comment](https://vercel.live/open-feedback/literature-template-git-agent-preview-targ-b188ca-codiscover-ai.vercel.app?via=pr-comment-feedback-link) | Jun 5, 2026 6:55am |

## AI Review Synthesis

<!-- sepo-agent-review-synthesis -->
<!-- sepo-agent-review-synthesis-head: 87ce9aaa26ad32dda82571bb69b678d6ef6db2d5 -->

> Dual-agent review by **Claude** and **Codex**.
> Requested by @lolipopshock.

## Summary of PR/Issue
- PR #19 adds a changed-file gate to the Sepo site preview workflow so preview builds only run for site-affecting paths.
- It keeps teardown as a separate close-event job and documents the new target paths in the README.
- The goal is to avoid spending preview build/deploy work on agent-only, config-only, or docs-only PRs such as PR #18.
- The current implementation correctly avoids an `on.pull_request.paths` filter so close events can still reach teardown.

## Review
The path detection itself looks reasonable, but the false branch creates a preview lifecycle regression. One reviewer considered the PR shippable with advisory notes; the other raised this edge case, and the current diff supports it.

| Issue | Severity | Description |
| -- | -- | -- |
| Stale preview persists when site changes are removed | BLOCKING | When `site_changed=false`, the workflow skips build/deploy but does not clear a preview from an earlier PR revision. A PR can briefly publish changed site content, later revert to a non-site diff, and keep serving the stale public preview until close. |

## Progress
- Existing inline comments and review threads were empty before synthesis.
- Posted one inline comment on `.github/workflows/agent-site-preview.yml` line 56 covering the stale-preview false branch.
- The workflow `check` job is passing; current preview deploy/teardown jobs are skipped.
- Advisory README/glob-style notes from the ship review are non-blocking and not included as automation action items.

## Issue Details
<details>
<summary>Stale preview persists when site changes are removed</summary>

**Cause:** The new gate writes `site_changed=false` and then skips checkout, build, upload, and deploy, but the only teardown path still requires `github.event.action == 'closed'`. See https://github.com/self-evolving/literature-template/blob/87ce9aaa26ad32dda82571bb69b678d6ef6db2d5/.github/workflows/agent-site-preview.yml#L56 and the teardown condition below it.

**Candidate solutions:** Add a cheap false-branch cleanup path that calls the existing teardown endpoint when `site_changed=false`, and clear or update the PR preview comment so the public URL is not advertised as current. A 404 from teardown can remain acceptable for PRs that never deployed.

**Comments:** This is the only material reviewer disagreement: Claude marked the PR as ship-ready, while Codex flagged this lifecycle edge case. The live workflow confirms the stale-preview path still exists.

</details>

## Recommended Next Step
`FIX_PR`: the unresolved issue requires a concrete workflow change and is suitable for an automated fix-pr pass.

## Final Verdict
NEEDS_REWORK

## Action Items
- [ ] Add false-branch cleanup for `site_changed=false` so previously deployed previews are torn down or clearly marked stale when current PR changes no longer affect the site.

---
_Run: `codex` / `gpt-5.5/xhigh` / `xhigh`_

title: Gate site previews on target file changes
